en.name: Cognation
en.summary: Activate two buttons in Desolate Forest, defeat the spawned Desecrated Rock Golem, then pick up the Artifact of Cognation.
steps: Route into Desolate Forest, Stage Variant #4, on Modern ruleset.
Find the hidden vine on the right side of the stage.
Activate both puzzle buttons.
Defeat the spawned Desecrated Rock Golem.
Pick up the Artifact of Cognation at the Artifact Portal.

zh-Hans.name: 相性
zh-Hans.summary: 激活 两个 按钮 在 荒芜森林，击败 生成的 亵渎石傀儡，然后 拾取 神器：相性。
steps: 进入 荒芜森林，关卡变体 #4，在 现代规则集。
找到 隐藏藤蔓 在 右侧 的 关卡。
激活 两个 谜题 按钮。
击败 生成的 亵渎石傀儡。
拾取 神器：相性 在 神器传送门。

source.label: Risk of Rain Returns Wiki: Desolate Forest / Artifact of Cognation

en.name: Command
en.summary: Find and pick up the Artifact of Command in Hive Cluster.
steps: Route into Hive Cluster, Stage Variant #1, #2, or #3.
Go to the top-right area of the stage. The cached wiki image text identifies the artifact in the top right of Stage Variant #1.
Pick up the Artifact of Command.

zh-Hans.name: 统率
zh-Hans.summary: 找到并拾取 神器：统率 在 蜂巢集群。
steps: 进入 蜂巢集群，关卡变体 #1，#2，或 #3。
前往 右上方 area 的 关卡. cached wiki image text identifies artifact 在 top right 的 关卡变体 #1。
拾取 神器：统率。

source.label: Risk of Rain Returns Wiki: Hive Cluster / Artifact of Command

en.name: Dissonance
en.summary: Find 4 hidden Artifact Shards to unlock Artifact of Dissonance.
steps: Collect the shard in Ancient Valley variants #4-#6: it is on the right side of the central mountain and can be reached by a hidden chain or rope at the top of the mountain.
Collect the shard in Sunken Tombs Stage Variant #5.
Collect the shard in Magma Barracks variants #4-#6: the cached wiki note places it near the top-right of the map on Stage Variant #6.
Collect the shard in Hive Cluster variants #1-#3: the cached wiki note points to the Bloated Survivor in the bottom-right of Stage Variant #1.
After 4 total Artifact Shards are collected, Artifact of Dissonance unlocks.

zh-Hans.name: 纷争
zh-Hans.summary: 找到 4 隐藏的 神器碎片 以 解锁 神器：纷争。
steps: Collect the shard in 远古峡谷 variants #4-#6：it is 在 右侧 的 中央山体 并 can be reached by 隐藏的 chain 或 rope 在 top 的 mountain。
收集 shard 在 沉没陵墓 关卡变体 #5。
Collect the shard in 熔岩兵营 variants #4-#6：cached wiki note places it 在附近 右上方 的 地图 在 关卡变体 #6。
Collect the shard in 蜂巢集群 variants #1-#3：cached wiki note points 以 膨胀幸存者 在 右下方 的 关卡变体 #1。
After 4 total 神器碎片 are collected，神器：纷争 unlocks。

source.label: Risk of Rain Returns Wiki: Ancient Valley / Artifact of Dissonance
Risk of Rain Returns Wiki: Sunken Tombs / Artifact of Dissonance
Risk of Rain Returns Wiki: Magma Barracks / Artifact of Dissonance
Risk of Rain Returns Wiki: Hive Cluster / Artifact of Dissonance

en.name: Distortion
en.summary: Press the hidden button in Damp Caverns to spawn the Artifact of Distortion on a nearby pedestal.
steps: Route into Damp Caverns, Stage Variant #1, #2, or #3.
Find the artifact button. The cached wiki image text specifically identifies the button location on Stage Variant #2.
Press the button.
Go to the pedestal to the left of the button location and pick up the spawned artifact.

zh-Hans.name: 扭曲
zh-Hans.summary: 按下 隐藏的 按钮 在 潮湿洞穴 以生成 神器：扭曲 在 nearby pedestal。
steps: 进入 潮湿洞穴，关卡变体 #1，#2，或 #3。
找到 artifact 按钮. cached wiki image text specifically identifies 按钮 location 在 关卡变体 #2。
按下 按钮。
前往 pedestal 以 left 的 按钮 location 并 拾取 生成的 artifact。

source.label: Risk of Rain Returns Wiki: Damp Caverns / Artifact of Distortion

en.name: Enigma
en.summary: Use the hidden bottom-right cove route in Sunken Tombs to reach and pick up the Artifact of Enigma.
steps: Route into Sunken Tombs, Stage Variant #1, #2, or #3.
Go to the bottom-right of the map and find the drop-down into a cove.
Move right through the cove route.
Use the hidden geyser boost to reach the tunnel.
Follow the tunnel to the end and pick up the Artifact of Enigma.

zh-Hans.name: 谜团
zh-Hans.summary: 使用 隐藏的 右下方 小洞穴 路线 在 沉没陵墓 以 到达 并 拾取 神器：谜团。
steps: 进入 沉没陵墓，关卡变体 #1，#2，或 #3。
前往 右下方 的 地图 并 找到 drop-down into 小洞穴。
Move right 穿过 小洞穴 路线。
使用 隐藏的 geyser boost 以 到达 tunnel。
沿着 tunnel 以 end 并 拾取 神器：谜团。

source.label: Risk of Rain Returns Wiki: Artifact of Enigma
Risk of Rain Returns Wiki: Sunken Tombs / Artifact of Enigma

en.name: Glass
en.summary: Complete the hidden timed button challenge in Ancient Valley to spawn the Artifact of Glass.
steps: Route into Ancient Valley, Stage Variant #1, #2, or #3.
Go to the left side of the map and find the cave hidden behind walls or ropes.
Enter the platforming challenge area.
Hit all 5 buttons spread through the challenge within 15 seconds.
Pick up the spawned Artifact of Glass.

zh-Hans.name: 玻璃
zh-Hans.summary: 完成 隐藏的 timed 按钮 challenge 在 远古峡谷 以生成 神器：玻璃。
steps: 进入 远古峡谷，关卡变体 #1，#2，或 #3。
前往 左侧 的 地图 并 找到 cave 隐藏的 behind 墙壁s 或 ropes。
Enter platforming challenge area。
Hit all 5 按钮 扩散 穿过 challenge within 15 seconds。
拾取 生成的 神器：玻璃。

source.label: Risk of Rain Returns Wiki: Ancient Valley / Artifact of Glass

en.name: Honor
en.summary: Find and pick up the Artifact of Honor in Desolate Forest.
steps: Route into Desolate Forest, Stage Variant #1, #2, or #3.
On Stage Variant #3, check the top-left side of the map, to the right of the waterfall.
Look for a blue root in the floor and use the hidden path there to reach the artifact.
Pick up the artifact object.

zh-Hans.name: 荣耀
zh-Hans.summary: 找到并拾取 神器：荣耀 在 荒芜森林。
steps: 进入 荒芜森林，关卡变体 #1，#2，或 #3。
On 关卡变体 #3，check top-左侧 的 地图，以 right 的 waterfall。
寻找 blue root 在 floor 并 使用 隐藏的 path there 以 到达 artifact。
拾取 artifact object。

source.label: Risk of Rain Returns Wiki: Desolate Forest / Artifact of Honor

en.name: Kin
en.summary: Break into the hidden area in Dried Lake and activate three buttons to reveal the Artifact of Kin.
steps: Route into Dried Lake, Stage Variant #1, #2, or #3.
Go to the far right side of the stage and find the breakable wall.
Break the wall with a suitable Survivor skill. The cached wiki note says Hopoo Feather, Rusty Jetpack, or Photon Jetpack can be required to reach it.
Activate all three buttons in the puzzle room.
Pick up the Artifact of Kin at the Artifact Portal.

zh-Hans.name: 亲族
zh-Hans.summary: Break into 隐藏的 area 在 干涸湖泊 并 激活 three 按钮 以显露 神器：亲族。
steps: 进入 干涸湖泊，关卡变体 #1，#2，或 #3。
前往 far 右侧 的 关卡 并 找到 breakable 墙壁。
Break 墙壁 带有 suitable Survivor skill. cached wiki note says Hopoo Feather，Rusty Jetpack，或 光子喷气背包 can be required 以 到达 it。
激活 all three 按钮 在 谜题 room。
拾取 神器：亲族 在 神器传送门。

source.label: Risk of Rain Returns Wiki: Dried Lake / Artifact of Kin

en.name: Prestige
en.summary: Get gold rank in at least 15 Providence Trials to unlock Artifact of Prestige.
steps: Open Providence Trials.
Complete trials with gold rank until at least 15 trials have gold rank.
Return to the artifact/challenge list and confirm Artifact of Prestige is unlocked.

zh-Hans.name: 威望
zh-Hans.summary: 获得 金币 rank 在 在 least 15 天命试炼 以 解锁 神器：威望。
steps: Open 天命试炼。
完成 trials 带有 金币 rank until 在 least 15 trials 拥有 金币 rank。
Return 以 artifact/challenge list 并 confirm 神器：威望 is unlocked。

en.name: Origin
en.summary: Kill Providence while the nine base artifacts are enabled to unlock the Artifact of Origin.
steps: Unlock Honor, Kin, Distortion, Glass, Spite, Enigma, Sacrifice, Command, and Spirit.
Start a run with all nine of those artifacts enabled.
Reach Risk of Rain.
Kill Providence.
Artifact of Origin unlocks for all players in the lobby.

zh-Hans.name: 起源
zh-Hans.summary: 击杀 天命 while nine base artifacts are enabled 以 解锁 神器：起源。
steps: 解锁 荣耀，亲族，扭曲，玻璃，恶意，谜团，牺牲，统率，并 精神。
Start run 带有 all nine 的 those artifacts enabled。
到达 暴雨。
击杀 天命。
神器：起源 unlocks for all 玩家 在 lobby。

source.label: Risk of Rain Returns Wiki: Risk of Rain / Artifact of Origin

en.name: Sacrifice
en.summary: Shoot three buttons hidden behind walls in Magma Barracks to unlock the Artifact of Sacrifice.
steps: Route into Magma Barracks Stage Variant #1, #2, or #3 on any ruleset.
Search throughout the stage for three buttons hidden behind walls.
Shoot all three hidden buttons. Evolved Lemurians can also hit the buttons, which helps characters that cannot attack through walls.
Pick up the Artifact of Sacrifice after the button objective is completed.

zh-Hans.name: 牺牲
zh-Hans.summary: Shoot three 按钮 隐藏的 behind 墙壁s 在 熔岩兵营 以 解锁 神器：牺牲。
steps: 进入 熔岩兵营 关卡变体 #1，#2，或 #3 在 any ruleset。
搜索 throughout 关卡 for three 按钮 隐藏的 behind 墙壁s。
Shoot all three 隐藏的 按钮. 飞天利莫里亚人s can also hit 按钮，which helps characters that cannot 攻击 穿过 墙壁s。
拾取 神器：牺牲 在之后 按钮 objective is completed。

source.label: Risk of Rain Returns Wiki: Artifact of Sacrifice
Risk of Rain Returns Wiki: Artifact of Sacrifice
Risk of Rain Returns Wiki: Artifact of Sacrifice
Risk of Rain Returns Wiki: Magma Barracks / Artifact of Sacrifice

en.name: Spirit
en.summary: Complete the parkour course below Temple of the Elders to obtain the Artifact of Spirit.
steps: Route into Temple of the Elders, Stage Variant #1, #2, or #3.
Go below the right side of the map.
Enter the parkour course.
Reach the end of the course and pick up the artifact.

zh-Hans.name: 精神
zh-Hans.summary: 完成 parkour course below 长老神殿 以 获得 神器：精神。
steps: 进入 长老神殿，关卡变体 #1，#2，或 #3。
Go below 右侧 的 地图。
Enter parkour course。
到达 end 的 course 并 拾取 artifact。

source.label: Risk of Rain Returns Wiki: Temple of the Elders / Artifact of Spirit

en.name: Spite
en.summary: Use a Parent enemy to break the fissure in Sky Meadow, then complete the hidden obstacle course.
steps: Route into Sky Meadow, Stage Variant #1, #2, or #3.
Near the center of the stage, find the small crack in the ground.
Lead a Parent enemy to the crack and make it smash the fissure until it breaks.
Enter the newly opened hole below the map.
Complete the hidden obstacle course and pick up the Artifact of Spite.

zh-Hans.name: 恶意
zh-Hans.summary: 使用 祖人 敌人 以 break fissure 在 空中草原，然后 完成 隐藏的 障碍路线。
steps: 进入 空中草原，关卡变体 #1，#2，或 #3。
Near 中央 的 关卡，找到 small crack 在 ground。
Lead 祖人 敌人 以 crack 并 make it smash fissure until it breaks。
Enter newly opened hole below 地图。
完成 隐藏的 障碍路线 并 拾取 神器：恶意。

source.label: Risk of Rain Returns Wiki: Sky Meadow / Artifact of Spite

en.name: Tempus
en.summary: Reach Temple of the Elders before 16 minutes and pick up the Artifact of Tempus before it disappears.
steps: Route into Temple of the Elders on any stage variant.
Reach the stage before 16 minutes have passed in the run.
Pick up the Artifact of Tempus before it disappears.
If Temple of the Elders is reached after 16 minutes, the artifact will not appear.

zh-Hans.name: 须臾
zh-Hans.summary: 到达 长老神殿 在之前 16 分钟 并 拾取 神器：须臾 在之前 it disappears。
steps: 进入 长老神殿 在 any stage variant。
到达 关卡 在之前 16 分钟 拥有 passed 在 本局。
拾取 神器：须臾 在之前 it disappears。
If 长老神殿 is reached 在之后 16 分钟，artifact will not appear。

source.label: Risk of Rain Returns Wiki: Temple of the Elders / Artifact of Tempus

en.name: The Toxin
en.summary: Find the Illegal Shipment in the final Risk of Rain stage storage room to unlock The Toxin.
steps: Route to the final Risk of Rain stage.
Find a keycard from golden containers, enemies, or blast-door areas.
Go to the storage room on the far right side of the ship before Providence.
Use the keycard, then inspect/open the black hidden chests on the shelves until The Toxin is found.

zh-Hans.name: 毒素

steps: Route 以 final 暴雨 stage。
找到 keycard 从 金色 containers，敌人，或 blast-door areas。
前往 储藏室 在 far 右侧 的 ship 在之前 天命。
使用 keycard，然后 调查/open black 隐藏的 chests 在 shelves until 毒素 is found。

Collect the prism.

steps: Do not surface this 作为 actionable 路线 recommendation。
Cached 飞行员 wiki data lists matching fifth 飞行员 skin slot 作为 当前无法获得。
Keep language-pack challenge entry for completeness，but treat it 作为 unavailable until later game/wiki update exposes 路线。
notes: Cached 飞行员 wiki page lists 飞行员Portrait5 作为 当前无法获得。
Refreshed cached stage pages 在 2026-07-02 并 re-parsed stage 棱镜 sections；only 9 棱镜 sections were found，none for 飞行员/Napalm。
wiki.gg Special：搜索 for Napalm returned no results。
Google results for exact phrase mainly point 以 community guides for all 9 known 棱镜s，not Napalm。
data.win string scan found oStrangePrism/oSpawnPrism 并 飞行员 sprites，but no Napalm 或 pilot-specific 棱镜 路线 strings。

Risk of Rain Returns Wiki: Challenges

en.name: Ancient Valley
en.summary: Normal Stage 3 pool. It can appear randomly after clearing the previous stage teleporter; visiting it records the stage.

zh-Hans.name: 远古峡谷
zh-Hans.summary: 普通第 3 关池。通过第 2 关传送器后随机出现。

en.name: Damp Caverns
en.summary: Normal Stage 2 pool. It can appear randomly after clearing the previous stage teleporter; visiting it records the stage.

zh-Hans.name: 潮湿洞窟
zh-Hans.summary: 普通第 2 关池。通过第 1 关传送器后随机出现。

en.name: Desolate Forest
en.summary: Normal Stage 1 pool. It can appear randomly after clearing the previous stage teleporter; visiting it records the stage.

zh-Hans.name: 荒凉森林
zh-Hans.summary: 普通第 1 关池。正常开局随机出现，到访即可记录。

en.name: Dried Lake
en.summary: Normal Stage 1 pool. It can appear randomly after clearing the previous stage teleporter; visiting it records the stage.

zh-Hans.name: 枯涸湖
zh-Hans.summary: 普通第 1 关池。正常开局随机出现，到访即可记录。

en.name: Hive Cluster
en.summary: Normal Stage 4 pool. It can appear randomly after clearing the previous stage teleporter; visiting it records the stage.

zh-Hans.name: 虫巢
zh-Hans.summary: 普通第 4 关池。通过第 3 关传送器后随机出现。

en.name: Magma Barracks
en.summary: Normal Stage 4 pool. It can appear randomly after clearing the previous stage teleporter; visiting it records the stage.

zh-Hans.name: 熔岩要塞
zh-Hans.summary: 普通第 4 关池。通过第 3 关传送器后随机出现。

en.name: Risk of Rain
en.summary: Final stage. Use the Divine Teleporter after Stage 5; after looping, the Divine Teleporter can also route here.

zh-Hans.name: 暴雨滂沱
zh-Hans.summary: 最终关。第 5 关之后使用 Divine Teleporter 前往；循环后也可以通过 Divine Teleporter 选择前往。

en.name: Sky Meadow
en.summary: Normal Stage 2 pool. It can appear randomly after clearing the previous stage teleporter; visiting it records the stage.

zh-Hans.name: 空中草原
zh-Hans.summary: 普通第 2 关池。通过第 1 关传送器后随机出现。

en.name: Sunken Tombs
en.summary: Normal Stage 3 pool. It can appear randomly after clearing the previous stage teleporter; visiting it records the stage.

zh-Hans.name: 沉没墓园
zh-Hans.summary: 普通第 3 关池。通过第 2 关传送器后随机出现。

en.name: Temple of the Elders
en.summary: Fixed Stage 5. Enter it after clearing the previous stage teleporter.

zh-Hans.name: 长老神殿
zh-Hans.summary: 固定第 5 关。通过第 4 关传送器后进入。

en.name: Acrid
en.summary: Free the chained creature.

zh-Hans.name: 呛鼻毒师
zh-Hans.summary: 解救被束缚的生物。

en.name: Artificer
en.summary: Visit 10 unique stages.

zh-Hans.name: 工匠
zh-Hans.summary: 拜访10个独特关卡。

en.name: Bandit
en.summary: Beat the 3rd stage.

zh-Hans.name: 潜行者
zh-Hans.summary: 完成第3关卡。

en.name: CHEF
en.summary: Obtain Meat Nugget, Bustling Fungus, Sprouting Egg, Bitter Root and Foreign Fruit in one run.

zh-Hans.name: 大厨
zh-Hans.summary: 在一轮游戏中获得肉块、爆裂真菌、芽孢蛋、苦根以及异星水果。

en.name: Drifter
en.summary: Recycle 6 drones in one playthrough.

zh-Hans.name: 漂泊者
zh-Hans.summary: 在一局游戏中回收6台无人机。

en.name: Enforcer
en.summary: Kill the Magma Worm, Wandering Vagrant, and Colossus.

zh-Hans.name: 执行者
zh-Hans.summary: 击杀岩浆蠕虫、游荡流浪者与巨像。

en.name: Engineer
en.summary: Purchase 40 drones total.

zh-Hans.name: 工程师
zh-Hans.summary: 总计购买40台无人机。

en.name: HAN-D
en.summary: Find the damaged robot janitor container on the final Risk of Rain stage to unlock HAN-D.
steps: Route to the final Risk of Rain stage.
Explore cargo/blast-door areas until you find a damaged cargo door area.
Look for stacked pink containers and the one visibly damaged or compromised.
Interact with the container to unlock HAN-D for future runs.

zh-Hans.name: 韩-迪
zh-Hans.summary: 找到 damaged robot janitor container 在 final 暴雨 stage 以 解锁 韩-迪。
steps: Route 以 final 暴雨 stage。
探索 cargo/blast-door areas until you 找到 damaged cargo door area。
寻找 stacked pink containers 并 一个 visibly damaged 或 compromised。
与其互动 container 以 解锁 韩-迪 for future runs。

en.name: Loader
en.summary: Obtain 30 unique items in one playthrough.

zh-Hans.name: 装卸工
zh-Hans.summary: 在一轮游戏中获得30份独特物品。

en.name: Mercenary
en.summary: Beat the game 5 times.

zh-Hans.name: 雇佣兵
zh-Hans.summary: 通关游戏5次。

en.name: Miner
en.summary: Clear a path for the survivor.

zh-Hans.name: 矿工
zh-Hans.summary: 为幸存者清出道路。

en.name: Pilot
en.summary: Collect 15 Monster Logs.

zh-Hans.name: 领航员
zh-Hans.summary: 收集15份怪物日志。

en.name: Sniper
en.summary: Beat the game.

zh-Hans.name: 狙击手
zh-Hans.summary: 通关游戏。

en.name: Caustic Climb
en.summary: Use your <b>Toxic Bubbles</c> to launch yourself out of the drowning pit. <y>Climb at least 70 meters</c> before time runs out.

zh-Hans.name: 酸蚀之跃
zh-Hans.summary: 利用你的<b>剧毒泡泡</c>将自己弹出致命水池。在时间截止前<y>攀登至少70米</c>。

en.name: A Toxic Path
en.summary: Race past hordes of enemies in the fungal cavern. <y>Finish 3 laps</c> to complete the trial.

zh-Hans.name: 剧毒之道
zh-Hans.summary: 争分夺秒穿越真菌洞窟中的大量敌人。<y>跑完3圈</c>以完成试炼。

en.name: Uncontrolled Experiment
en.summary: <y>Shatter all the targets</c> within the winding halls. <b>Dissolving Ambush</c> allows you to create puddles to warp across large gaps in the interior.

zh-Hans.name: 失控实验
zh-Hans.summary: 在蜿蜒长廊中<y>粉碎所有目标</c>。<b>溶解伏击</c>将允许你创造水池以穿越内部的巨大间隙。

en.name: Lightning Strikes Twice
en.summary: <y>Pierce at least 7 Golems</c> in a row. You can repeat the input once per strike to flex the <b>Pulse Spear</c>, granting it a temporary piercing effect.

zh-Hans.name: 闪电连击
zh-Hans.summary: 一次性<y>穿透至少7个傀儡</c>。每次打击时你可以重复输入以抖动<b>脉冲长枪</c>，这将赋予临时的穿透效果。

en.name: Danger Orbits
en.summary: <y>Burn at least 50 enemies</c> utilizing your <b>Localized Sun</c>. Your body movements manipulate the attack's position.

zh-Hans.name: 危险轨道
zh-Hans.summary: 利用你的<b>局部太阳</c><y>焚烧至少50名敌人</c>，你的身体动作将改变攻击位置。

en.name: In the Clouds
en.summary: Utilizing <b>Tectonic Surge</c>, <y>race to the top of the tower</c> to reach your goal.

zh-Hans.name: 九霄云外
zh-Hans.summary: 利用<b>地壳涌动</c><y>攀爬高塔</c>并抵达目标。

en.name: Endless Stand-Off
en.summary: <y>Defeat at least 30 opponents<y> in the desert <b>while affected by Standoff</c>. This trial ends when your <b>Standoff</c> buff wears off.

zh-Hans.name: 永恒对峙
zh-Hans.summary: 于沙漠中在<b>对峙效果影响下</c><y>打败至少30名敌人<y>。<b>对峙</c>失效时，试炼将立即结束。

en.name: Highway Robbery
en.summary: Drop a <b>Flashbang</c> to evade detection as you scavenge as much gold as possible. Escape via the teleporter <y>with at least 700 gold</c>.

zh-Hans.name: 拦路抢劫
zh-Hans.summary: 利用<b>闪光弹</c>避免被敌人发现，同时尽可能收集金钱。<y>携带至少700金钱</c>离开传送器。

en.name: Castle of Memories
en.summary: Fight your way through the ancient temple to <y>defeat the boss</c> guarding the exit.

zh-Hans.name: 银河回忆城
zh-Hans.summary: 竭尽全力穿越古老神庙并<y>打败看守出口的Boss</c>。

en.name: A Fresh Harvest
en.summary: Defeat <y>at least 20 Lemurians</c> before time runs out. Bonus Time pickups spawn temporarily to extend the timer.

zh-Hans.name: 用料新鲜
zh-Hans.summary: 赶在时间截止前打败<y>至少20名利莫里亚人</c>。拾取能够推迟倒计时的临时时间奖励。

en.name: Kited Blades
en.summary: <y>Shatter at least 75 targets</c> before you reach the end of the underwater chasm.

zh-Hans.name: 飞翔之刃
zh-Hans.summary: 在抵达深海裂隙终点前<y>粉碎至少75个目标</c>。

en.name: The Right Ingredients
en.summary: <b>Cook</c> <y>at least 15 enemies</c> before time runs out. Deaths result in scoring penalties.

zh-Hans.name: 用料妥当
zh-Hans.summary: 在时间截止前<b>烹饪</c><y>至少15名敌人</c>。死亡将导致分数惩罚。

en.name: A Colossal Feat
en.summary: Defeat a horde of enemies guarding the final <y>Colossus</c>.

zh-Hans.name: 事无巨细
zh-Hans.summary: 打败成群结队的敌人并面对最终的<y>巨像</c>。

en.name: Brave Heart, Steady Hand
en.summary: Stay close and <y>defeat the Elder Lemurian</c> utilizing your <b>Combat Knife</c>. Retreating results in more reinforcements.

zh-Hans.name: 杀伐果断
zh-Hans.summary: 近身肉搏，利用<b>作战匕首</c><y>打败利莫里亚长老</c>。撤退将会引来更多增援。

en.name: Slide to the Finish!
en.summary: Utilizing your <b>Tactical Slide</c>, <y>race to the final statue</c> to reach your goal.

zh-Hans.name: 滑向终点！
zh-Hans.summary: 利用<b>战术滑行</c><y>抵达最终雕塑</c>并完成目标。

en.name: A Rung Above
en.summary: Defeat enemies to spawn score pickups. Survive and <y>collect at least 40 points</c>.

zh-Hans.name: 扶摇直上
zh-Hans.summary: 打败敌人将生成得分拾取物品。生存并<y>收集至少40分</c>。

en.name: S.O.S.
en.summary: Fly around the cavern and <y>shatter at least 50 targets</c> as a Drone. Enemy aggression escalates with score.

zh-Hans.name: S.O.S。
zh-Hans.summary: 作为无人机在洞窟中飞行并<y>粉碎至少50个目标</c>。敌人的攻击性将随分数逐步提升。

en.name: Equivalent Exchange
en.summary: <b>Recycle</c> Monster Teeth to acquire Rusty Knives. You need <y>at least 8 knives</c> before activating the teleporter.

zh-Hans.name: 等价交换
zh-Hans.summary: <b>回收</c>怪物牙齿以换取生锈匕首。你需要<y>至少8把匕首</c>才能激活传送器

en.name: Perilous Descent
en.summary: <y>Collect at least 100 gold</c> and <y>reach the bottom of the cave</c>. Your <b>Scrap Cubes</c> slide when struck, even while atop them. <b>Try aiming for corners</c>.

zh-Hans.name: 致命下落
zh-Hans.summary: <y>收集至少100金钱</c>并<y>抵达洞窟最深处</c>。你可以通过攻击滑动<b>碎片方块</c>，就算站在方块上面也一样能够起效。<b>尝试瞄准角落位置</c>。

en.name: A Duplicator?!
en.summary: <y>Collect at least 100 items</c> before time expires. <b>Salvage</c> frequently summons Substandard Duplicators, which will multiplicatively improve your score.

zh-Hans.name: 复制器？！
zh-Hans.summary: 在时间截止前<y>收集至少100件物品</c>。频繁<b>回收</c>将召唤瑕疵复制器，这将帮助你的分数成倍增长。

en.name: Specimen Sampling
en.summary: Utilizing your <b>Shield Tackle</c>, lead the Gups to the scrapped together device. <y>You'll need at least 4 Gips worth</c> of material to secure the sample.

zh-Hans.name: 活体采样
zh-Hans.summary: 利用<b>护盾擒拿</c>引导加普前往胡乱拼凑的装置。<y>你需要相当于至少4格普的材料</c>来获取样本。

en.name: Inner Demons
en.summary: <y>Defeat your own shadows</c> as soon as possible.

zh-Hans.name: 心中恶魔
zh-Hans.summary: 尽快<y>打败你的影子</c>。

en.name: Go On Without Me
en.summary: <y>Defeat at least 85 Lemurians</c> on the treacherous mountain.

zh-Hans.name: 你们先走
zh-Hans.summary: 在危机四伏的山脉中<y>打败至少85名利莫里亚人</c>。

en.name: Scavenger Hunt
en.summary: Collect items and drones to assist in <y>defeating the deadly Scavenger</c>. Your foe is frenzied and well equipped.

zh-Hans.name: 狩猎清道夫
zh-Hans.summary: 借助物品与无人机<y>打败致命清道夫</c>。你的敌人处于狂暴状态并且装备精良。

en.name: Get Off My Lawn!
en.summary: Defend yourself from the violent plants to acquire healing items. <y>Have at least 750 health</c> when the timer runs out.

zh-Hans.name: 滚出我的草坪！
zh-Hans.summary: 抵挡危险植物并获取治疗物品。在时间截止前<y>拥有至少750点生命值</c>。

en.name: From All Angles
en.summary: Use your turrets and <b>Shockwave Mines</c> to defeat at least 50 of the encroaching enemies. If either of your turrets break down its all over.

zh-Hans.name: 四面楚歌
zh-Hans.summary: 利用炮塔与<b>冲击波地雷</c>打败至少50名不断逼近的敌人。如果任何一个炮塔被摧毁，你将立刻失败。

en.name: Drowning in Research
en.summary: Defeat <y>at least 50 of the sinking enemies</c> using your <b>Mortar Barrage</c>. You will incur damage if enemies reach the bottom of the tank.

zh-Hans.name: 溺亡研究
zh-Hans.summary: 利用<b>迫击炮轰炸</c>打败<y>至少50名下沉的敌人</c>。如果敌人抵达最深处，你将承受伤害。

en.name: Judgement
en.summary: <y>Defeat all that stand before you</c> to reach the <b>final throne.</c>

zh-Hans.name: 审判
zh-Hans.summary: <y>打败所有阻挡你的敌人</c>，然后前往<b>最终王座。</c>

en.name: Think of the Children
en.summary: <y>Guide at least 5 Children</c> to the distant Parent. The wandering Golems contain trapped keycards.

zh-Hans.name: 为了孩子
zh-Hans.summary: <y>引导至少5名魔童</c>前往地处遥远的祖人。游荡的傀儡将携带被困住的钥匙卡。

en.name: Routine Maintenance
en.summary: Clean up the top of the massive bridge! Clear at least 25 invaders to fulfill programmed orders.

zh-Hans.name: 例行维护
zh-Hans.summary: 肃清巨大桥梁的顶部！解决至少25名入侵者以满足指令。

en.name: Main Systems Offline
en.summary: Fire your <b>Drones</c> at the attacking invaders and <y>score at least 200 points</c>. Scoring points awards keycards and tougher enemies are worth more points.

zh-Hans.name: 主系统离线
zh-Hans.summary: 对进攻的入侵者发射<b>无人机</c>并<y>获得至少200分</c>。持续得分以获取钥匙卡奖励，强大的敌人将提供更多分数。

en.name: Piercing Space and Time
en.summary: <y>Climb to the teleporter</c> using <b>Warp Darts</c> in order to reach the teleporter.

zh-Hans.name: 穿越时空
zh-Hans.summary: 使用<b>曲速飞镖</c><y>前往传送器</c>并抵达终点。

en.name: A Small Army
en.summary: An overloading shrine holds 100 Tiny Imps.  <y>Defeat 60 Imps</c> utilizing your chargeable <b>Piercing Arrows</c> to secure victory.

zh-Hans.name: 人小鬼大
zh-Hans.summary: 超载神龛中将藏有100个小小恶魔。利用可蓄力的<b>穿透箭</c><y>打败60个小恶魔</c>以夺得胜利。

en.name: Hot-Rope Hop
en.summary: <y>Destroy at least 10 targets</c> in the rope-filled magma cavern.

zh-Hans.name: 热辣荡绳
zh-Hans.summary: 在满是绳索的岩浆洞窟中<y>摧毁至少10个目标</c>。

en.name: Blades in the Wind
en.summary: <y>Defeat at least 1 Toxic Beast</c>, utilizing your <b>Laser Cyclone</c> to deal consistent damage. Avoiding the returning glaive results in extended up-time.

zh-Hans.name: 风中之刃
zh-Hans.summary: <y>打败至少1头猛毒巨兽</c>，利用你的<b>激光旋风</c>造成持续伤害。躲避回旋的月刃将延长技能时间。

en.name: Crash Landing
en.summary: <y>Collect at least 40 points</c> before time runs out. Your aerial <b>Short Circuit</c> can be used to traverse the cavern quickly.

zh-Hans.name: 紧急坠毁
zh-Hans.summary: 赶在时间截止前<y>收集至少40点</c>。在空中发动<b>短路</c>以快速穿越洞窟。

en.name: Colossal Lift
en.summary: In the ruins of an ancient forest <y>defeat 10 Colossi</c> as fast as you can. Revived drones can be amplified by utilizing your <b>S260 Conduit</c> skill.

zh-Hans.name: 泥塑巨人
zh-Hans.summary: 在远古森林的废墟中尽快<y>打败10头塑像</c>。利用你的<b>S260导体</c>技能强化复活的无人机。

en.name: Ruins of the Future
en.summary: <y>Crush at least 25 hiding Mechanical Spiders</c> before they can escape.

zh-Hans.name: 未来废墟
zh-Hans.summary: <y>粉碎至少25只躲藏起来的机械蜘蛛</c>，不要让它们有机会逃走。

en.name: Shadows of the Past
en.summary: <y>Defeat your unbound shadow-clone</c> as soon as possible.

zh-Hans.name: 过去之影
zh-Hans.summary: 尽快<y>打败你被释放的暗影克隆</c>。

en.name: Assassination Contract
en.summary: <y>Defeat the 6 bosses</c> lurking near the scattered teleporters as soon as possible. Utilize <b>Skyward Assault</c> to better navigate the corridors.

zh-Hans.name: 暗杀契约
zh-Hans.summary: 尽快前往各个传送器并<y>打败6个Boss</c>。利用<b>向天猛袭</c>快速穿越走廊。

en.name: Don't Think, Feel
en.summary: <y>Deflect at least 10 attacks</c> using <b>Focused Strike</c>. Well timed parries provide temporary invulnerability.

zh-Hans.name: 不要思考，去感受
zh-Hans.summary: 使用<b>集中打击</c><y>偏转至少10次攻击</c>。看准时机招架将能够提供暂时的无敌效果。

en.name: Scorching Heart
en.summary: Using <b>Crush</c>, charge your Heat Meter to <y>maintain</c> <b>Scorching</c> <y>for at least 60 seconds</c> in the hot volcano.

zh-Hans.name: 灼热之心
zh-Hans.summary: 使用<b>粉碎</c>提升热能计量条，在炽热火山中<y>维持</c><b>灼热</c><y>至少60秒</c>。

en.name: Gup Sorting?
en.summary: Gups, Geeps and Gips each belong in different pens. It's up to you to <y>decipher where they belong</c>. Your <y>Prison Shackles</c> can assist in splitting the pack.

zh-Hans.name: 加普排序？
zh-Hans.summary: 加普、基普以及格普都对应着不同的围栏。<y>弄清楚他们的归属</c>。你的<y>监狱镣铐</c>能够帮助分割归类。

en.name: Break the Targets!
en.summary: <y>Shatter every target</c>, utilizing well placed <b>Throwing Axes</c>. Pickaxes may pass through objects while rising, and they inherit your speed when thrown.

zh-Hans.name: 打破目标！
zh-Hans.summary: 利用精准的<y>飞镐</c><b>粉碎所有目标</c>。镐子在上升时能够穿透物体，你的速度将影响镐子的飞行速度。

en.name: Emergency Ejection
en.summary: <y>Glide to the bottom of the chasm</c> in your parachute, <y>collecting at least 55 points</c> on the way down.

zh-Hans.name: 紧急弹射
zh-Hans.summary: 利用降落伞<y>滑翔至裂隙最深处</c>，同时在路上<y>收集至少55分</c>。

en.name: Juggling Priorities
en.summary: Using <b>Airstrikes</c>, keep the Crab afloat for at least 25 seconds. Additionally, <c>Target Acquired</c> can be used in addition to slow its descent.

zh-Hans.name: 杂耍投掷
zh-Hans.summary: 利用<b>空中打击</c>使沙蟹至少在空中飘浮25秒。除此以外，你还可以使用<c>发现目标</c>来减慢它的下降速度。

en.name: Race to the Finish!
en.summary: <y>Race to the finish</c> before time runs out. The <b>Aerobatic</c> dash clings to walls, allowing you to scale them for a time.

zh-Hans.name: 奔向终点！
zh-Hans.summary: 在时间截止前<y>赶到终点</c>。<b>空中</c>冲锋将使你贴住墙体，并允许你暂时攀爬。

en.name: Bullseyes Only
en.summary: <y>Shatter 15 targets</c> in the lava filled cavern. <b>Quickscope</c> can be used to fire through walls.

zh-Hans.name: 百发百中
zh-Hans.summary: 在充满岩浆的洞窟中<y>粉碎15个目标</c>。<b>快枪</c>能够穿透墙体。

en.name: Meteor Showers
en.summary: Utilize the Glowing Meteorite terminals to <y>score at least 40 points</c>. Triggering the teleporter <b>doubles your score</c>.

zh-Hans.name: 陨石雨
zh-Hans.summary: 利用发光陨石终端<y>获得至少40分</c>。触发传送器将<b>使你的得分翻倍</c>。

en.name: Lone Wolf
en.summary: <y>Defeat at least 35 foes</c> from within the outpost. Enemy speeds increase with score.

zh-Hans.name: 独狼
zh-Hans.summary: 在哨所中<y>击败至少35名敌人</c>。敌人的速度将随你的得分逐渐提高。
